name: Junior PHP-Laravel Developer
address: The Pearl Trade Center, 8th Floor, Cha-90/3 Pragati Sarani, North Badda, Dhaka 1212
summary:
WiztecBD is looking for a Junior PHP-Laravel Developer to join our talented team. If you're passionate about web development, eager to learn, and want to build your career in Laravel, we'd love to hear from you.

Responsibilities:

  • Collaborate with senior developers to design, develop, and maintain web applications using the Laravel framework.
  • Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code.
  • Assist in troubleshooting and debugging issues.
  • Participate in code reviews to ensure code quality and best practices.
  • Stay updated with the latest Laravel and PHP developments.

Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field.
  • Basic knowledge of PHP and Laravel is a plus but not mandatory.
  • Strong problem-solving skills and a passion for coding.
  • Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
  • Eagerness to learn and adapt to new technologies.

Benefits:

  • Competitive salary.
  • Mentorship from experienced developers.
  • Opportunities for growth and career advancement.
  • Collaborative and inclusive work environment.
  • Regular training sessions and workshops.

Working Days:

Sunday - Thursday (Weekly 5 Days)

Office Time:

10:00 AM - 07:00 PM

Location:

Level-9, F Haque Tower, Bir Uttam C R Datta Road, Dhaka - 1205

name: Content Development Specialist - Software Development
address: The Pearl Trade Center, 8th Floor, Cha-90/3 Pragati Sarani, North Badda, Dhaka 1212
summary:
Employment Type: Part-time/Contract/Remote

Job Overview:

We are seeking a highly skilled and creative Content Development Specialist with a strong background in Software Development to join our dynamic team. The successful candidate will be responsible for developing engaging and informative content that promotes our Software Development services and showcases our expertise in the industry. This role requires a deep understanding of Software Development concepts and technologies, as well as excellent writing and communication skills.

Responsibilities:

  • Research, create, and edit compelling content for various platforms, including website pages, blog posts, case studies, whitepapers, social media, and marketing collateral.
  • Collaborate with subject matter experts, developers, and designers to gather information and translate complex technical concepts into clear, concise, and engaging content.
  • Conduct market research and competitor analysis to identify trends, industry best practices, and unique selling points to differentiate our software development services.
  • Develop a content strategy aligned with the company's goals, audience, and industry trends to attract and engage potential clients.
  • Optimize content for search engine optimization (SEO) to improve organic traffic and website rankings.
  • Maintain and update the company's knowledge base, documentation, and technical resources to support internal and external users.
  • Stay up to date with the latest software development trends, technologies, and industry news to provide valuable insights and thought leadership.

Requirements:

  • Applicant should have 3 Years’ Experience in a relevant field.
  • Proven experience as a Content Development Specialist, Copywriter, Technical Writer, or similar role in the software development industry.
  • In-depth knowledge of software development concepts, methodologies, programming languages, and frameworks.
  • Strong writing, editing, and proofreading skills with the ability to present complex information in a clear and concise manner.
  • Strong attention to detail and a passion for creating high-quality content.
  • Familiarity with design principles and the ability to work closely with graphic designers.

How to Apply:

To apply for this position, please send your resume, portfolio, and a cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and why you are interested in joining us.

Email your application to hrwiztecbd@gmail.com.

We appreciate all applicants' interest, but only those selected for an interview will be contacted.

name: Digital Marketing
address: The Pearl Trade Center, 8th Floor, Cha-90/3 Pragati Sarani, North Badda, Dhaka 1212
summary:
WizTecBD is seeking a highly motivated and enthusiastic Digital Marketing Intern to join our dynamic marketing team. This is an excellent opportunity for a passionate individual to gain hands-on experience in the fast-paced world of digital marketing.

Responsibilities:

  • Assist in managing and executing social media strategies across various platforms, including content creation, scheduling, and engagement.
  • Support the development and optimization of website content, ensuring it aligns with SEO best practices and drives organic traffic.
  • Assist in planning and executing paid advertising campaigns on platforms like Google Ads, Facebook Ads, or LinkedIn Ads, including keyword research, ad copywriting, and performance tracking.
  • Aid in the creation and execution of email marketing campaigns, including copywriting, template design, audience segmentation, and performance analysis.
  • Conduct market research and competitor analysis to inform marketing strategies and identify new opportunities.
  • Communicate with clients to understand their requirements and serve them with our best service.
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to coordinate marketing efforts, share ideas, and ensure consistent branding and messaging.
  • Stay up to date with software industry trends and best practices, actively seeking out opportunities for learning and professional development.

Qualifications:

  • Currently pursuing a degree in CSE, EEE, Marketing, Advertising, Communications, or a related field.
  • Basic understanding of digital marketing principles and channels, including social media, SEO, paid advertising, and email marketing.
  • Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
  • Strong organizational and time management abilities.
  • Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
  • Familiarity with social media platforms and analytics tools.
  • Enthusiasm for learning and a proactive attitude.

This is a 6-month internship position with the potential for future opportunities based on performance. We offer a supportive and collaborative work environment where you will have the chance to gain valuable experience and contribute to real-world marketing initiatives.

Salary: 5k - 8k (As per your skill)

Intern Period: 6 months

Working Hours: 09:30AM – 06:30PM

Working Days: Sunday – Thursday

Location: Level 9 (West Side), 107 F Haque Tower, Bir Uttam C R Datta Road, Sonargaon Road, Dhaka-1205

If you are eager to jump-start your career in digital marketing and are excited about joining our team, .
